summary: Tested Predictive Intelligence Layer feature on Dashboard. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. Fixed datetime comparison bug in AI summary endpoint. The Predictive Intelligence card renders correctly with Brain icon and gradient bar. All 4 tabs work: Alerts (2 compliance alerts with severity badges), Growth (60 employees, 57.25 FTE, hiring history chart, 6-month projections), Exposure ($0 current exposure, $4,200 employer cost, $260,110 worst case, penalty breakdown), Scenario (5 presets + custom inputs, current vs after comparison with penalty delta and warnings). AI Analysis button works but LLM budget exceeded (external limitation). Guided Compliance Workflow card renders below. Quick Actions card removed.

issues: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' for months 2025-12 and 2026-03 - minor React key issue in bar chart rendering

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/predictive/alerts/{employer_id} returns 200 with alerts array
Backend: Alerts have severity, title, detail, action, category fields
Backend: GET /api/predictive/growth/{employer_id} returns 200 with current workforce, history, projections
Backend: Growth response has total, full_time, part_time, total_fte, is_ale, avg_monthly_hires, ft_hire_ratio
Backend: GET /api/predictive/exposure/{employer_id} returns 200 with current_exposure, premium_costs, worst_case, rates
Backend: Exposure has penalty_a, penalty_b, total_penalty_exposure, affordability_exposure fields
Backend: POST /api/predictive/scenario/{employer_id} with add_full_time:10 returns scenario comparison
Backend: Scenario response has current, scenario, delta, warnings fields
Backend: POST /api/predictive/scenario with drop_mec_coverage:true returns warnings about penalties
Backend: POST /api/predictive/ai-summary/{employer_id} returns 200 with summary and generated flag
Backend: AI summary returns fallback message when LLM unavailable
Frontend: Dashboard loads for employer fajju2001@gmail.com / test123
Frontend: Predictive Intelligence card renders with Brain icon and gradient bar
Frontend: Alerts tab shows 2 compliance alerts with severity badges (ALE Status, Enrollment)
Frontend: Growth tab shows 60 employees, 57.25 FTE, hiring history bar chart, 6-month projections
Frontend: Exposure tab shows $0 current exposure, $4,200 employer cost, $260,110 worst case, penalty breakdown
Frontend: Scenario tab shows all 5 preset buttons (Hire 10 FT, Hire 25 FT, Reduce 10 FT, Drop MEC, Low MV Plan)
Frontend: Hire 10 FT scenario shows current vs after comparison (FTE 57.25→66.38, MEC 100%→82.5%, Penalty $0→$80,190)
Frontend: Drop MEC scenario shows warnings about penalty triggers
Frontend: AI Analysis button shows toast 'AI summary unavailable' (LLM budget exceeded)
Frontend: Refresh button reloads predictive data
Frontend: Guided Compliance Workflow card renders below Predictive Intelligence
Frontend: Quick Actions card removed from dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: datetime comparison bug in predictive.py line 520 - hire_dates were offset-naive but compared with offset-aware datetime.now(timezone.utc)
Fixed: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY was on same line as ADP_REDIRECT_URI in backend/.env - separated to new line
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employer with 60 employees (47 FT, 13 PT), 57.25 FTE, ALE status

mocked_apis.note: AI summary uses real emergentintegrations LLM but budget exceeded - returns fallback message

context_for_next_testing_agent: Predictive Intelligence Layer fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) All 5 backend endpoints working: alerts, growth, exposure, scenario, ai-summary. 2) Alerts endpoint returns rule-based compliance alerts with severity (critical/warning/info/low), category, title, detail, action. 3) Growth endpoint returns current workforce (60 employees, 57.25 FTE), hiring history (12 months), 6-month projections with ALE trigger detection. 4) Exposure endpoint returns penalty breakdown (4980H(a), 4980H(b), affordability), premium costs, worst case scenarios. 5) Scenario endpoint supports presets (hire10, hire25, reduce10, dropMec, lowMv) and custom inputs, returns current vs scenario comparison with delta and warnings. 6) AI summary uses emergentintegrations LLM (gpt-4o-mini) but budget exceeded - gracefully returns fallback message. 7) Fixed datetime bug in predictive.py and .env formatting issue.
